\tzpentry{ID4506}{Lagrangian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4506 introduces Lagrangian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \label{eq:Lagrangian} \mathcal{L}{U} = \frac{c^4}{16\pi G},R[g] ;+; \mathcal{L}{\rm QFT}[\Psi, A\mu] ;+; \mathcal{L}{\rm topo}[A\mu] ;+; \mathcal{L}{\rm info}[\Phi] ;+; \mathcal{L}{\rm bio}[\Xi]~, \end{equation}
